name: After Schema Change
description: Reminds to migrate and regenerate Prisma client after schema edits

then.prompt: The Prisma schema was just edited. Please: 1) Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name <describe_change> --schema=signal-lab/prisma/schema.prisma`, 2) Run `npx prisma generate --schema=signal-lab/prisma/schema.prisma`, 3) Check for TypeScript errors with `npx tsc --noEmit` in signal-lab/apps/backend, 4) If a new model was added, remind the user to run /add-endpoint for the new resource.
